use_cases: Primary call-to-action trigger in forms and dialogs
Action button within cards, modals, or navigation headers
Submit or cancel controls in multi-step forms
Icon-only button for compact toolbar interfaces
AsChild wrapper pattern for rendering anchor or external elements as buttons
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (sm, md, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variants, and standard accessibility features including focus-visible ring and disabled state handling. Fully themeable via Tailwind CSS with ring-offset support for focus management.
